expected_records.title: The Eventi Room
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Tuesday and Thursday from 1:00pm-10:00pm; Monday, Wednesday, Friday and Saturday from 10:00am-10:00pm
expected_records.description: Gather in The Eventi Room to create arts & crafts!

description.text: Gather in The Eventi Room to create arts & crafts!

expected_records.title: Nature Walk
expected_records.description: Enjoy a self-led nature walk around Barefoot Bay. Pick up a Nature Guide at The Eventi Room to get started.

description.text: Enjoy a self-led nature walk around Barefoot Bay. Pick
up a Nature Guide at The Eventi Room to get started.

expected_records.title: Poolside Activities
expected_records.description: Join us for fun and games, both in and out of the pool.

description.text: Join us for fun and games, both in and out of the pool.

expected_records.title: Cote D’Azur Campfire
expected_records.location: Fire Pit near Riviera Feature Pool waterfront
expected_records.description: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary marshmallows. S'mores kits available for purchase.

location.text: Fire Pit near Riviera Feature Pool waterfront

description.text: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary
marshmallows. S'mores kits available for purchase.

expected_records.title: Art De La Mosaique
expected_records.description: Experience the timeless and classic tradition of mosaic creation with an instructor-led crafting class. This experience is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up. To sign up, please see a Recreation Cast Member inside The Eventi Room.

description.text: Experience the timeless and classic tradition of mosaic
creation with an instructor-led crafting class. This experience
is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up. To sign up, please
see a Recreation Cast Member inside The Eventi Room.

expected_records.title: Nighttime Trivia
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday at 7:30pm
expected_records.description: Put your knowledge to the test with this evening challenge!

description.text: Put your knowledge to the test with this
evening challenge!

expected_records.title: Starlight Soiree
expected_records.description: Sparkle and shine under the stars during this evening poolside party with fun and games, both in and out of the pool.

description.text: Sparkle and shine under the stars during this evening
poolside party with fun and games, both in and out of

expected_quarantine_records.title: Painting On The Riviera
expected_quarantine_records.description: Get in touch with your inner artist in this unique instructor-led painting class! This experience is recommended for Guests ages and up. To reserve your spot, please call see a Recreation Cast Member inside The Eventi Room. ¢ a PY

reviewed_manual_records.title: Find A Friend
reviewed_manual_records.description: Search the Resort for a hidden Pascal photo prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to The Eventi Room to receive a surprise!

manual_review.notes: Verified against the rendered PDF because OCR missed the visual title.
